title: 3D Amethyst
body:
# What this RSP does?
Make 3D shape for all Amethyst variants (Calibrated Sculk Sensor included).


![All amethyst variant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ba4af342dccc8a8bf034743971a162a248975c6_0.webp)

Please do not steal/modify textures unless for personal uses only! Do not create downloads for this on your own! Always link back to this site due to it being the original location. Texture Pack and details belong to ThienSinh. Thank you.
